summary: 30-day avg SOFR declining from 3.77 on Jan 2 toward ~3.70 by Jan 14 as post-Fed-cut daily SOFR values (~3.64-3.75) replace higher pre-cut values in the 30-day window
content: The 30-Day Average SOFR was 3.77354 on Jan 2, 2026, declining steadily since Dec 12 when the rolling window started incorporating post-Fed-cut SOFR values. Daily SOFR has been in the 3.64-3.77 range since mid-December. The average daily decline has been ~0.013-0.015 but is decelerating as the window fills with post-cut values. By Jan 14, the 30-day window starts around Dec 15 when daily SOFR was already at lower post-cut levels (~3.69-3.75). Projected value: ~3.70 with narrow uncertainty band of ±0.03.
